caption: A large, blue and white presidential aircraft, identified as Air Force One, is positioned on an airport runway against a backdrop of rolling green mountains and a distant town. The plane features four jet engines and "UNITED STATES OF AMERICA" written along its fuselage. In the top right corner of each frame, a circular red and white "13" logo is visible. As the sequence progresses, the aircraft begins to move forward and slightly lift its nose, transitioning from a stationary position to the start of a takeoff roll. In the latter half of the sequence, a white text banner appears at the bottom of the screen containing the words "AIR FORCE ONE" in bold, black capital letters. No people are visible in the frames.
